task_completion.description: Open Garmin BaseCamp and locate the target track/route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Garmin BaseCamp is open and the target data (named 'fells_loop' or 'BELLEVUE') is visible or selected in the library pane.

task_completion.description: Open the properties or measurement tool to view the enclosed area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties window, summary tab, or measurement tool is open for the selected track/route, displaying an area measurement.

task_completion.description: Ensure the area measurement is displayed in Acres.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The area value in the properties or measurement window is explicitly labeled with 'Acres' or 'ac'.

task_completion.description: Rename the track to the specified format with the rounded acreage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The track name in the list or properties window is updated to match 'Fells_Conservation_[X]_Acres', where [X] is a whole number (e.g., 820).

task_completion.description: Export the renamed track as a GPX file to the specified output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog box shows the file being saved as 'fells_conservation.gpx' in 'C:\workspace\output\', or a file explorer window confirms the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to perform the tasks rather than command-line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp menus, properties windows, and export dialogs, rather than a terminal window executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually create or modify the GPX file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) are used to manually type out the XML/GPX structure or rename the track.

integrity.description: The area value was genuinely derived from the software's measurement capabilities.
integrity.visual_evidence: The acreage value used in the renaming step matches the value displayed in the BaseCamp properties/measurement window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is C:\workspace\output\fells_conservation.gpx. The track must be renamed to match the regex ^Fells_Conservation_(\d+)_Acres$. The actual area of the polygon is approximately 820 acres. With a 15% tolerance allowed, the integer [X] in the renamed track should be a value between 697 and 943.
